---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that MeOS doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. How would it fit the local-first, privacy-first model?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or related issues.
